title: Coerce String to Object
cap_description: Wrap a string value in a record
documentation:
## Purpose

Wraps a string value in a record so it can be passed to caps that expect a structured record input. The string is stored under a standard key in the output record.

## Inputs

A textable string value (media type `media:textable`).

## Outputs

A record containing the string value.

## Notes

- Type adapter for the capfab planner.
- For the reverse, use [Coerce Object to String](https://capdag.com/browse/cap:in=media:record;op=coerce;out=media:textable).
